testCases.title: Cross-Cutting — Configurable Product Page Title
testCases.notes: Configurable Hat PDP title: 'QA & Configurable Hat' (per CMS-011 page title pattern). QA prefix applied consistently. Page title updates with product name.

testCases.title: Cross-Cutting — Configurable Product in GA4
testCases.notes: Configurable Hat PDP visit fires view_item event in dataLayer (per GA4-006). Color option selection fires select_item or view_item variant event (GA4-021). Add to Cart fires add_to_cart event with configured price $20.00.

testCases.title: Cross-Cutting — VCST-4713 Fix Verification
testCases.notes: VCST-4713: Configurable Hat Black hat option $10 + base $10 = $20.00. Price update on radio selection working. This was a bug fix verified in this sprint. Price calculation correct per sprint delivery notes.

testCases.title: Cross-Cutting — Configurable Product Accessibility
testCases.notes: Per feedback_a11y_coffee_only.md: Coffee theme only passes A11y. Configurable Hat PDP with Coffee theme: radio inputs have aria-label, text input has label, file upload has label. Section headings present. Keyboard navigation possible through options.

testCases.title: Cross-Cutting — Configurable Product SEO
testCases.notes: Configurable Hat PDP has title tag 'QA & Configurable Hat'. Meta description from product description. Structured data (JSON-LD) expected for product with price $10 (base). Canonical URL for configurable product.

testCases.title: Cross-Cutting — Configurable Product URL
testCases.notes: Configurable Hat URL: /configurable-hat or /catalog/configurable-hat (clean slug). URL does not encode option selections (options in JS state only). Shareable URL loads PDP without pre-selected options.

testCases.title: Cross-Cutting — Configurable Product Security
testCases.notes: Text input (Customize text) XSS-safe: input sanitized before rendering (per SEC testing). File upload: server-side validation of file type expected. No script injection via custom text field. Per Suite 044 (Security) verification approach.

testCases.title: Cross-Cutting — Configurable Product Performance
testCases.notes: Configurable Hat PDP loads within performance budget. Option selection price update reactive (<200ms). No full page reload on option change. Vue.js reactivity handles option updates efficiently.

testCases.title: Cross-Cutting — Configurable Product with Promotions
testCases.notes: After adding Configurable Hat ($20) to cart, DISCOUNT & COUPONS section shows same 4 coupons. Automatic -$0.01 discount applies to cart with configurable product. BestRewardPromotionPolicy covers configured products.

testCases.title: Cross-Cutting — Configurable Product Image Gallery
testCases.notes: Configurable Hat PDP shows product image(s). Image gallery may update on color selection (shows hat in selected color). Image alt text present for accessibility. No broken image placeholders.

testCases.title: Cross-Cutting — Configurable Product Indexing
testCases.notes: Configurable Hat appears in search results and catalog. Admin Search Indexing (Suite 061) covers index refresh. Configurable product searchable by name and attributes. Per suite 004 search verification.

testCases.title: Cross-Cutting — Configurable Product in Lists/Wishlists
testCases.notes: Configurable products can be added to B2B Lists and Wishlists. List stores product SKU (base or with options). Cart-to-list and wishlist-to-cart flows supported for configurable products.

testCases.title: Cross-Cutting — Configurable Product BOPIS
testCases.notes: Configured Configurable Hat (Black, $20) can be picked up via BOPIS if available at pickup location. BOPIS availability checked per SKU variant. Pickup option in SHIPPING DETAILS for configured product. $0.00 shipping for pickup.

testCases.title: Cross-Cutting — Configurable Product Cart Merge
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: Verifying cart merge (guest cart + logged-in cart) with configurable product requires guest cart state. Guest cart with Configurable Hat + authenticated cart merge not tested in this run.

testCases.title: Cross-Cutting — Configurable Product Comparison
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: Product comparison feature for configurable products (if available) not tested. Comparison between configurable variants (e.g., Black Hat vs Beige Hat) deferred.

testCases.title: Cross-Cutting — Configurable Product Inventory Display
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: Per-variant inventory display (In Stock for Black hat, Out of Stock for Beige) on PDP not verified. Inventory badge per option selection requires per-SKU inventory data.

testCases.title: Cross-Cutting — VCST-4987 Pending Implementation
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: Per project memory (project_vcst_4987_pending_updates.md): preset-option serialization by optionId (not customText) not verified. Cross-cutting impact of VCST-4987 deferred until fix ships.

testCases.title: Cross-Cutting — Configurable Product i18n
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Configurable product section labels and option names in non-English locale deferred. Locale testing for configurable products part of Suite 046 (i18n).

testCases.title: Cross-Cutting — Configurable Product Storybook Components
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Storybook visual regression for configurable product UI components (radio group, file upload, text input configurator) deferred to ui-ux-expert via /qa-storybook skill.

testCases.title: Cross-Cutting — Configurable Product Cross-Browser
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Configurable Hat UI tested on Edge only (playwright-edge). Chrome and Firefox cross-browser verification deferred to Suite 048 (Browser Compatibility).
